steps.title: Triage incident signal
steps.prompt: Classify the incoming signal by severity, probable scope, immediate containment need, customer impact, and open unknowns. Return a concise triage summary for the operator.

steps.title: Recommend next actions
steps.prompt: Using the previous triage report in this workflow run, produce the next three actions, suggested owners, rollback or mitigation options, and the most important follow-up question.
